channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 590,000 — Vainona 5-Bed Home with Pool on 5,260m² (Vainona, Harare North)
item.description: USD 590,000 — Vainona, Harare North. 5 beds, 3 baths. Vainona 5-Bed Home with Pool on 5,260m². Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
